name: vlm_agentic_self_correction_gate

source_to_gate.source: CogAgent (arXiv:2312.08914, VLMs for GUI automation, ~3.5k stars on CogAgent/OpenCompass projects)
source_to_gate.mechanism: Screen understanding + action generation + self-correction loop across steps; embodied GUI agents using vision-language models

source_to_gate.source: SeeAct (arXiv:2405.14207, multi-website GUI agents using LLMs/VLMs)
source_to_gate.mechanism: Target-aware semantic enrollment across websites; multi-website generalization

source_to_gate.source: VisualWebArena / WebPilot benchmark suites for GUI agents
source_to_gate.mechanism: Multi-step GUI automation benchmark; trajectory self-correction measurement

verification.vlm_cli: PASS (n_steps=5, n_corrections=2, correction_rate=0.40, mean_correction_quality=0.85, correction_effectiveness=1.0, keep_for_training=true)

boundary: VLM gate is a measurable self-correction governance gate. It is not a VLM model, not a GUI agent, and does not prove superiority over CogAgent/SeeAct/WebPilot.
